# Document templates

This folder stores upload-ready document templates for Commrent.

## Rental contract

`commrent-rental-contract-template.docx` is a clean DOCX template for the rental contract generator. It contains placeholders instead of real tenant, landlord, rent, dates, area, and bank details.

Key placeholders used:

- `{tenant_name}`, `{tenant_director}`, `{tenant_basis}`, `{tenant_bin}`, `{tenant_address}`
- `{landlord_name}`, `{landlord_short}`, `{landlord_basis}`, `{landlord_bin}`, `{landlord_address}`
- `{contract_number}`, `{contract_date_long}`, `{start_date_long}`, `{end_date_long}`
- `{building_address}`, `{placement}`, `{space_area}`
- `{rate_per_sqm}`, `{monthly_rent_with_words}`, `{payment_due_day}`, `{penalty_percent}`
- `{utilities_clause}`, `{signage_clause}`

Upload this file in the document template settings for the rental contract type.
